notes: Supports AO1 dashboard evidence and threshold interpretation.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO1 operational control view with high-risk items, high-risk rate, high-risk order value, negative-profit high-risk items, weekly high-risk exposure, policy evidence, and immediate review queue.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO2 profitability view with scored order items, expected profit, average expected profit, expected margin, negative-profit items, profit distribution, validation evidence, and risk-margin exposure by AO3 segment.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO2 margin-protection view with expected profit, expected margin, recent profit movement, negative-profit items, top loss concentration, weekly expected profit and margin, margin protection brief, and loss review queue.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO3 risk-margin operational priorities with scored order items, protect-first queue, protect-first share, value at risk, selective expedite, priority matrix, action queue, and governance status.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO3 operations allocation view with active review queue, protect queue, value to protect, selective expedite, preserve service, weekly protection capacity, allocation brief, operational performance, and attention allocation.

key_metrics_or_focus: AO3 capacity timing view with latest four-week protection queue, protected value, average value per protection item, selective expedite, weekly protection capacity, managerial implication, and action steps.
